author: driver--comprehensive-readme-and-quarto-docs-src-documentation
content: Result: Comprehensive documentation overhaul complete. Created 4 new Quarto guide pages (swarm.qmd, knowledge.qmd, tui.qmd, container-agents.qmd). Updated _quarto.yml navbar/sidebar with all new pages + kickoff-report reference. Updated index.qmd with 4 new feature cards. Expanded commands.qmd with kickoff, swarm, container, TUI, and context command sections. Updated multi-agent.qmd with SSH signing and cross-references. Updated hooks.qmd with drift detection, intervention tracking, and context verification. Updated hook-config.qmd with 8 new config field docs. Updated quickstart.qmd and README.md with links to all new guides.
